primary_goal: Reduce sales-ops friction so AEs can spend more time selling

verdict.summary_line: 3 deployable workflows, ~$45K committed, 0.5 FTE for 90 days
verdict.constraint_line: CRM data quality is the single largest blocker

talent_strategy.justification: Two ops leads with prompt-design depth; no ML capacity

workflow_optimization.justification: Sales pipeline documented but handoffs are tribal

digital_architecture.justification: HubSpot + Sheets only; no integration layer

knowledge_management.justification: No central knowledge base; SOPs live in Slack

ai_automation.justification: ChatGPT seats exist; nothing in production workflow

deployable.name: Lead enrichment Claude Skill
deployable.value_line: Removes ~6 hrs/week of AE manual research per rep
deployable.doi_effort: 1 day to scaffold + 1 week to demo

deployable.name: Pipeline hygiene ICM folder
deployable.value_line: Replaces tribal Slack handoffs with file-based stages

deployable.name: Renewal followup automation (Zapier)
deployable.value_line: Captures the 12% of renewals currently dropped

remediation.q1: Q1 (current): Stand up CRM data hygiene SOP — owner: ops lead — budget: $0
remediation.q2: Q2: Ship lead-enrichment skill + pipeline ICM — owner: ops lead — budget: $30K
remediation.q3: Q3: Renewal followup automation + measured Stage 3 review — owner: rev ops — budget: $15K
